finding: Best predictive model without transaction cost
evidence: regime_factor_lstm has test Sharpe 0.551, direction accuracy 51.622%, mean PnL 2.881 bp.

finding: Regime-factor model is strongest during COVID shock

evidence: At 2bp cost, raw regime_factor_lstm Sharpe drops to 0.222 with turnover 1.721.

finding: Position smoothing improves deployability under costs
evidence: At 5bp cost, smoothing improves Sharpe from -0.274 to 0.149, reducing turnover by 97.5%.
